guardrails: Do not execute action-risk commands without explicit operator intent.
Keep LILITH_LOCAL_ONLY=1 for this integration mode.
read_webpage remains blocked unless LILITH_ALLOW_WEB=1 and local-only mode is off.
Use /api/grok/local-index for private Grok-derived memory hints; do not publish source data.
